description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and white exterior walls, set on a rectangular green lawn. The front features a covered porch with columns, a driveway leading to a garage, and a walkway flanked by landscaping and a large tree. The rear of the house includes a backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery, providing ample outdoor living space. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with dormer windows on the upper level and larger windows on the ground floor. The side views reveal a mix of shrubbery, a fenced area, and access to the backyard amenities. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, blending traditional elements with modern suburban features.
description: A two-story white house with a gray gable roof, front porch, driveway, and a landscaped yard with a backyard pool. Symmetrical windows and classic Colonial Revival details define its suburban character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, driveway, garage, and prominent landscaping including a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and additional greenery, as well as the side elevation of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, garage door, and landscaped garden with shrubs and a tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the full backyard, pool, patio, and the rear facade of the house with more landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormer windows on the upper level
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, steps, and landscaped approach
